name: Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans whole green beans, drained (16 ounces each)
1 large can french fried onions, divided in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a baking dish, combine all ingredients except for 1/2 of the onions.
2. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
3. Top with remaining onions and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
